---
title: "Établi Table"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-table.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Self-hosted client</span>

> Bases, tables and rows from your own SeaTable — mobile.

Établi Table is a native iOS and Android client for a self-hosted SeaTable instance. List bases, open tables, view rows and edit individual cells — straight against your own server. Authentication uses a two-tier token hierarchy: a long-lived API token is exchanged for a short-lived base token, which is auto-refreshed.

![Table — not connected; configure the SeaTable server and credentials in Settings.](../_screens/0.1.0/01-login.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Anyone self-hosting SeaTable (or using their own SeaTable Cloud instance) who needs to reach data on the go — to jot a field note, look up an address, or update a status field.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. Sign-in happens on your self-hosted SeaTable server. Credentials (URL + API token) live only in the platform secure store (iOS Keychain · Android EncryptedSharedPreferences); the short-lived base token is kept in memory and auto-refreshed. Traffic only goes to the configured instance.

## Installation

Établi Table is **under active development**. There are no App Store, Google Play or F-Droid releases yet.

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-table/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/) · inside the app you will also find a Buy-Me-a-Coffee link.
